# Notas

::: callout-note
## notas
:::

::: callout-tip
## Tip
:::

::: callout-important
## Important
:::

::: callout-caution
## Caution
:::

::: callout-warning
## Warning
:::

:::: question
::: {.callout-tip icon="false"}
## Question

Sábados 10:00 am · Cupo limitado a 12 personas.
:::
::::

:::: puzzle
::: {.callout-tip icon="false"}
## puzzle

Sábados 10:00 am · Cupo limitado a 12 personas.
:::
::::
